name: Corn Stuffed Poblano Chiles
keywords: corn main dish mexican vegetables eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Set the oven control to broil.
2. Cut the chiles lengthwise into halves and carefully remove all the seeds.
3. Place the cut sides down on the rack in the broiler, about 4 inches from the heat, and broil until the skin blisters on the peppers.
4. Place the chiles in a plastic bag for 15 minutes, then carefully remove as much skin as possible.
5. Heat the oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
6. Beat the eggs in a medium bowl until thick and lemon-colored, about 4 minutes.
7. Stir in all remaining ingredients.
8. Place the chiles in a greased rectangular baking dish, 13 X 13 X 2 inches.
9. Spoon about 1/4 cup of the corn mixture into each chile half.
10. Cover and bake until the corn mixture is hot, about 25 minutes.
